english_reference: Walk past the sofa, go through the archway and upstairs to the bedroom window.
Turn left and walk down the hallway, passing the bathroom on your right. Stop at the end of the corridor.
Go straight through the kitchen, turn right at the refrigerator, and walk to the back door.
From the lobby, take the elevator to the second floor, turn left and walk down the hall to room 205.
Walk past the dining table, go through the sliding glass door and out to the patio.
From the reception desk, go straight past the conference room on your left. The office is at the end of the hallway.
Climb the stairs, turn right at the top, and enter the master bedroom. Stop in front of the closet.
Walk through the living room, past the fireplace, and out the French doors to the garden.
From the elevator, turn left and walk past the ice machine. The vending area is on your right.
Go down the stairs, turn left at the bottom, and walk straight to the garage door.
